CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Off Calendar

Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn For Application For An Osc Regarding A Preliminary Injunction And Req. For A Tro
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Off Calendar

Status Report
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Continued To Aug-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lien L. Uy, Esq. of Uy Law Group, (510-893-3294), for Adrian Tedeschi and Veronica Tedeschi, Plaintiffs.
Ryan F. Thomas, Esq. of Law Offices of Thomas Johnston, (707-545-6542), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Wilhelmina Beins, Defendant.

Parties report to the Court that the reinstatement/pay-off should be finalized soon. Plaintiffs further report that plaintiffs' received a call from the bank late pm on 8/12/14 re check to be released soon. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard the oral reports rules as follows: DEFENDANT WILHELMINA BEINS' Application For Order to Show Cause regarding A Preliminary Injunction And Request For A Temporary restraining order and Status Report Re: Appointment of Receiver is continued to August 28, 2014 at 9:30am in Dept. 501 for final status report on the reinstatement/pay-off. Parties waive notice. Court further orders the parties to inform Department 501 if reinstatement/pay-off is closed or finalized before the August 28, 2014 hearing, so the August 28, 2014 hearing may go off calendar. TRO remains in effect. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Ntc Of Mtn For Application For An Osc Regarding A Preliminary Injunction And Req. For A Tro
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Continued To Aug-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lien L. Uy, Esq. of Uy Law Group, (510-893-3294), for Adrian Tedeschi and Veronica Tedeschi, Plaintiffs.
Ryan F. Thomas, Esq. of Law Offices of Thomas Johnston, (707-545-6542), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Wilhelmina Beins, Defendant.

Parties report to the Court that the reinstatement/pay-off should be finalized soon. Plaintiffs further report that plaintiffs' received a call from the bank late pm on 8/12/14 re check to be released soon. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard the oral reports rules as follows: DEFENDANT WILHELMINA BEINS' Application For Order to Show Cause regarding A Preliminary Injunction And Request For A Temporary restraining order and Status Report Re: Appointment of Receiver is continued to August 28, 2014 at 9:30am in Dept. 501 for final status report on the reinstatement/pay-off. Parties waive notice. Court further orders the parties to inform Department 501 if reinstatement/pay-off is closed or finalized before the August 28, 2014 hearing, so the August 28, 2014 hearing may go off calendar. TRO remains in effect. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Continued To Aug-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
David M. Meeker, Esq. of Friedemann Goldberg LLP (707-543-4900) appears via Court Call for plaintiff
Ryan F. Thomas, Esq. of Johnston Thomas Attorneys (707-545-6542) appears via Court Call for Defendant Beins

Court hears status report and arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows:
The matter is continued to August 13, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 501 for further status report. Counsel for defendant shall prepare a [proposed written order indicating monthly payment to be lodged with the Court pending further order. Upon execution of the order by the Court, defendant counsel shall serve copies on the Tedeschies and the bank.

Status Report
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Continued To Jun-26-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David M. Meeker, Esq. of Friedermann Goldberg LLP, (707-543-4900), for Luther Burbani Savings, APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Plaintiff and moving party.
Ryan F. Thomas, Esq. of Johnston Thomas, (707-545-6542), for Roy N. Johnston, Defendant and opposing party.

HEARING is held. Defendant's counsel reports the status of the payments in open court. Plaintiff's counsel reports the outstanding issues. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER is continued to June 26, 2014 at 9:30am in Dept. 501, for status report. Parties waive notice. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Order To Show Cause Regarding Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Preliminary Injunction In Aid Of Receiver
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David M. Meeker, Esq. of Friedemann Goldberg, LLP (707-543-4900) for plaintiff/applicant party, Luther Burbani Savings
Ryan F. Thomas, Esq. of Johnston Thomas Law Offices (707-545-6542) for defendant/oppsing party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows: OSC Re: Appointment of Receiver and Preliminary Injunction is DENIED without prejudice for now. Denial of receiver appointment is subject to the following condition: By May 15, 2014 Defendant shall provide evidence of mortgage payment for March, April and May. Court continues matter for status report on May 29, 2014 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept 501. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)
